name: Clark v. Sweeney
summary: A 2025 case in which the Supreme Court summarily reversed a court of appeals' grant of habeas corpus because the court had relied on an argument the petitioner had not actually presented, illustrating the party-presentation principle.
significance: Justice Jackson invoked this very recent case—in which the Court summarily reversed a habeas grant based on an argument not raised below—to question whether the Court could reverse here on arguments Alabama never presented to the lower courts.
